title: Senior Project Manager - Frankfurt office
description_raw:
Hays Engineering are recruiting a Senior Project Manager for a 9-month contract based at our client’s Frankfurt office. The role oversees the delivery of a major mechanical plant upgrade programme at a manufacturing facility.

Responsibilities:
- Manage the project schedule, risk register, and change control process
- Coordinate mechanical and process engineering workstreams
- Stakeholder management across client site management and corporate engineering
- Administer NEC4 Short Form contracts with specialist mechanical subcontractors

Requirements:
- 7+ years mechanical project management
- German working rights (or EU passport)
- Fluent English; German language an advantage

Rate: £550 per day
Duration: 9 months
Start: October 2026
